name: Salmon with Curried Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a 2-quart souffle dish, uncovered, at high heat for 2 minutes. Add curry powder, onions, and cabbage and stir to coat.
2. Cover tightly with plastic wrap and cook at high heat for 4 minutes. Remove from oven and stir.
3. Mound cabbage mixture in the center of the dish and arrange salmon around the cabbage. Sprinkle salt, pepper, and lemon juice over all. Cover tightly with plastic wrap and cook at high heat for 8 minutes.
4. Remove from oven. Uncover and stir. Re-cover dish and let stand for 3 minutes before serving.
